functions.name: build_stanza_pipeline
functions.desc: Build Stanza tokenizer pipeline; download if missing

functions.name: regex_sentence_split
functions.desc: Fallback conservative sentence splitter using regex (?<=[.!?])\s+(?=[A-Z"“(]) and merging short buffers

functions.name: stanza_sentence_tokens
functions.desc: Return list of (sentence_text, token_count) using Stanza doc.sentences

functions.name: split_into_chunks_preserving_sentences
functions.desc: Chunk text <=max_tokens preserving sentences, isolate too-long sentence alone

functions.name: extract_json_array
functions.desc: Strip code fences and <think> tags, regex extract [ {..}, {..} ] array

functions.name: validate_payload
functions.desc: Check list of dicts contains REQUIRED_KEYS and correct types

functions.name: call_model
functions.desc: Call OpenAI Responses API with system+user template, extract and validate JSON

functions.name: dedupe_by_statement
functions.desc: Deduplicate by whitespace-squashed Ignorance Statement exact match

prompts.system_explicit: You are an expert scientific information extraction model. Return ONLY valid JSON.
prompts.user_explicit_template:
You are an expert scientific information extraction model.

TASK
Extract every scientific knowledge gap... OUTPUT FORMAT STRICT JSON array... DOCUMENT <<< {chunk} >>> Return only JSON array. If no gaps [], double quotes.

TABI_3shot.example_grounding: Compound E improves biomarker F in mice + biomarker F correlates poorly with human outcomes => It is unknown whether E improves patient outcomes

full_paper_pilot.output: 5-10 implicit gaps + Evidence Spans + Warrant + Gap Category + Future Direction + Feasibility Notes + Bucket

explicit_IPBES.metric: ROUGE-L F1 with stemming, one-to-one matching threshold 0.55

explicit_COVID.metric: Accuracy + ignorance cue dictionary validation (Boguslav et al)
explicit_COVID.filter: Exclude general non-research gaps, require at least one cue from dictionary
explicit_COVID.notes: Single gold per section but many latent gaps; leads to extra valid predictions

implicit_paragraph.metric: Accuracy via bi-directional entailment RoBERTa-large threshold 0.4

chunking.effect: Preserves semantic coherence, safe preprocessing, often boosts recall
